Package index

‘ordered’ package

Tidymodels Engine Wrappers and Parameters for Ordinal Classification Models

ordered ordered-package
ordered: parsnip Engines for Ordinal Regression Models

Wrappers

Wrappers for Ordinal Classification Engines

ordinalNet_wrapper() predict_ordinalNet_wrapper() predict(<_ordinalNet>) multi_predict(<_ordinalNet>) predict_raw(<_ordinalNet>) predict_classprob(<_ordinalNet>) predict_class(<_ordinalNet>)
Wrappers for ordinalNet
VGAM_vglm_wrapper() VGAM_vgam_wrapper() values_ordinal_link_VGAM
Wrappers for VGAM
rpartScore_wrapper()
A wrapper for rpartScore
ordinalForest_wrapper()
A wrapper for ordinalForest

Parameters

split_func() prune_func()
Dials for rpartScore engine parameters
naive_scores() num_scores() num_score_perms() num_score_trees() num_scores_best() ord_metric() values_ord_metric
